summary: Revision History Feature - Complete Testing. All features working correctly: Backend API, Frontend UI, History button, Revision modal with timeline view, before/after values, and Close button.

issues: Console shows 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' warnings - likely minor issue with whitespace in template

critical_code_review_comments: Minor console warning about 'Unexpected text node' in View - likely whitespace between JSX elements in revision history modal. Not critical but could be cleaned up.
seed_data_creation: Used existing approved quote Q/25-26/0103 which has 4+ revision entries from prior testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Revision History feature is fully functional. Backend API GET /api/quotes/{quote_id}/history returns revision entries sorted by timestamp descending. PUT /api/quotes/{quote_id} creates revision entry when packing_type, freight, discount, delivery_location change. Frontend shows History button in quote detail modal for admin users. Clicking opens Revision History modal with timeline view showing date, user, action badge, and before/after values with strikethrough for old values and green for new values. Close button works correctly.
